---
title: "bunnsekiR_bwd_20250524"
author: "bian"
date: "2025-05-24"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

## R Markdown

This is an R Markdown document. Markdown is a simple formatting syntax for authoring HTML, PDF, and MS Word documents. For more details on using R Markdown see <http://rmarkdown.rstudio.com>.

When you click the **Knit** button a document will be generated that includes both content as well as the output of any embedded R code chunks within the document. You can embed an R code chunk like this:

```{r cars}
summary(cars)
```

## Including Plots

You can also embed plots, for example:

```{r pressure, echo=FALSE}
plot(pressure)
```

Note that the `echo = FALSE` parameter was added to the code chunk to prevent printing of the R code that generated the plot.


```{r}
library(readxl)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(cluster)
source("anovakun_489.txt")
```

```{r}
all_data = read.csv("alldata.csv")
```

```{r}
assign("start_id", 1, envir = .GlobalEnv)
assign("end_id", 100, envir = .GlobalEnv)
missing_ids <- c()
missing_ids <- sort(c(missing_ids, 42))#width100
missing_ids <- sort(c(missing_ids, 20,59,73,83,57,19,55,70,79,92,38))#PI20
missing_ids <- sort(c(missing_ids, 14))#miss of syou
missing_ids <- sort(c(missing_ids, 47,50))#RT too long
missing_ids <- sort(c(missing_ids, 96,31))#width偏差
missing_ids1 <- missing_ids

# 删除这些ID对应的行
filtered_all <- all_data[!all_data$No %in% missing_ids1, ]

missing_ids_PI20 <- c(20, 59, 73, 83, 57, 19, 55, 70, 79, 92, 38)
PI20_data <- all_data[all_data$No %in% missing_ids_PI20, ]
```

```{r}
# 输出到CSV文件
write.csv(filtered_all, "filtered_all.csv", row.names = FALSE, fileEncoding = "UTF-8")
print("数据已保存到: filtered_all.csv")
# 输出到CSV文件
write.csv(PI20_data, "PI20_data.csv", row.names = FALSE, fileEncoding = "UTF-8")
print("数据已保存到: PI20_data")
```

```{r}
filtered_all_data <- filtered_all

# 直接使用原数据，只需要确保每个participant都有完整的三个条件
result_Th <- filtered_all_data[filtered_all_data$condition %in% c("u1", "f", "u2"), ]

# 检查是否有participant缺少某个条件
participant_condition_count <- table(result_Th$No, result_Th$condition)
cat("每个participant的条件数量:\n")
print(participant_condition_count)

# 只保留有完整三个条件的participant
complete_participants <- names(which(rowSums(participant_condition_count > 0) == 3))
result_Th <- result_Th[result_Th$No %in% complete_participants, ]

# 检查还剩下多少个No
cat("剩余的participant数量:", length(unique(result_Th$No)), "\n")
cat("剩余的participant编号:", sort(unique(result_Th$No)), "\n")

# 按No和condition排序
result_Th <- result_Th[order(result_Th$No, result_Th$condition), ]
```
```{r}
Th <- result_Th %>%
  select(No, order, gender,condition,Threshold)
anovakun(Th, "ABsC", long = TRUE,between = c("order", "gender"), within = "condition", dv = "Threshold",eta=TRUE)
```


##Threshold*order*condition*gender
```{r}
##Threshold*order*condition*gender
Th <- result_Th %>%
  select(No, order, gender,condition,Threshold)
anovakun(Th, "ABsC", long = TRUE,between = c("order", "gender"), within = "condition", dv = "Threshold",eta=TRUE)
```

##Width*order*condition*gender
```{r}
Th <- result_Th %>%
  select(No, order, gender,condition,Width)
anovakun(Th, "ABsC", long = TRUE,between = c("order", "gender"), within = "condition", dv = "Width",eta=TRUE)
```
##RT_mean*order*condition*gender
```{r}
Th <- result_Th %>%
  select(No, order, gender,condition,RT_mean)
anovakun(Th, "ABsC", long = TRUE,between = c("order", "gender"), within = "condition", dv = "RT_mean",eta=TRUE)
```
```{r}
# 创建包含所需列名的向量
selected_cols <- c("No", "condition", "Threshold", "Width", "Slope", "RT_mean", 
                   "key", "order", "gender", "age", "AQ", "social", 
                   "attention_switching", "local_attention", "communication", 
                   "imagination", "Friendship", "s.u1", "s.f", "s.u2", "PI20")

# 选择指定列创建新数据框
result_new <- result_Th[, selected_cols]


# 方法1：使用dplyr和tidyr包
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)

# 假设您的数据叫result_Th
# 转换为宽格式
result_wide <- result_new %>%
  pivot_wider(
    id_cols = c(No, setdiff(names(result_new), c("condition", "Threshold", "Width", "Slope", "RT_mean"))),
    names_from = condition,
    values_from = c(Threshold, Width, Slope, RT_mean),
    names_sep = "_"
  )

result_wide <- result_wide %>%
  mutate(
    differ1 = case_when(
      order == "fu" ~ RT_mean_u1 - RT_mean_f,      # 当order为fu时，u1-f
      order == "uf" ~ RT_mean_f - RT_mean_u1,      # 当order为uf时，f-u1
      TRUE ~ NA_real_                               # 其他情况设为NA
    ),
    differ2 = case_when(
      order == "fu" ~ RT_mean_u2 - RT_mean_u1,     # 当order为fu时，u2-u1
      order == "uf" ~ RT_mean_u2 - RT_mean_f,      # 当order为uf时，u2-f
      TRUE ~ NA_real_                               # 其他情况设为NA
    )
  )
```

```{r}
by(result_wide, result_wide$order, function(x) {
  cor.test(as.numeric(x$differ1), x$AQ)
})

by(result_wide, result_wide$order, function(x) {
  cor.test(as.numeric(x$differ2), x$AQ)
})

by(result_wide, result_wide$order, function(x) {
  cor.test(as.numeric(x$differ1), x$social)
})

by(result_wide, result_wide$order, function(x) {
  cor.test(as.numeric(x$differ2), x$social)
})
```


```{r}
cor.test(as.numeric(result_Th$RT_mean),result_Th$AQ)
cor.test(as.numeric(result_Th$RT_mean),result_Th$social)
cor.test(as.numeric(result_Th$RT_mean),result_Th$attention_switching)
cor.test(as.numeric(result_Th$RT_mean),result_Th$local_attention)
cor.test(as.numeric(result_Th$RT_mean),result_Th$communication)
cor.test(as.numeric(result_Th$RT_mean),result_Th$imagination)
cor.test(as.numeric(result_Th$RT_mean),result_Th$Friendship)
cor.test(as.numeric(result_Th$RT_mean),result_Th$PI20)
```

```{r}
by(result_Th, result_Th$order, function(x) {
  cor.test(as.numeric(x$RT_mean), x$social,conf.level = 0.975)
})
```


```{r}
# Set up data
result_RT <- result_Th

# Define percent variables and related variables
percent_vars <- c("percent_0", "percent_10", "percent_20", "percent_30", "percent_35", 
                  "percent_40", "percent_45", "percent_50", "percent_55", "percent_60", 
                  "percent_65", "percent_70", "percent_80", "percent_90", "percent_100")

outcome_vars <- c("AQ", "social", "attention_switching", "local_attention", 
                  "communication", "imagination")

# Create result storage matrices
correlation_results <- matrix(NA, nrow = length(percent_vars), ncol = length(outcome_vars))
p_values <- matrix(NA, nrow = length(percent_vars), ncol = length(outcome_vars))

rownames(correlation_results) <- percent_vars
colnames(correlation_results) <- outcome_vars
rownames(p_values) <- percent_vars
colnames(p_values) <- outcome_vars

# Perform correlation analysis
for (i in 1:length(percent_vars)) {
  for (j in 1:length(outcome_vars)) {
    # Conduct correlation test
    test_result <- cor.test(as.numeric(result_RT[[percent_vars[i]]]), 
                           result_RT[[outcome_vars[j]]])
    
    # Store results
    correlation_results[i, j] <- test_result$estimate
    p_values[i, j] <- test_result$p.value
  }
}

# Output results
cat("=== Correlation Coefficient Matrix ===\n")
print(round(correlation_results, 3))

cat("\n=== P-value Matrix ===\n")
print(round(p_values, 3))

# Significance markers
cat("\n=== Significant Results (p < 0.05) ===\n")
significant_results <- which(p_values < 0.05, arr.ind = TRUE)
if (nrow(significant_results) > 0) {
  for (k in 1:nrow(significant_results)) {
    row_idx <- significant_results[k, 1]
    col_idx <- significant_results[k, 2]
    significance_level <- ifelse(p_values[row_idx, col_idx] < 0.001, "***",
                                ifelse(p_values[row_idx, col_idx] < 0.01, "**", "*"))
    cat(sprintf("%s & %s: r = %.3f, p = %.3f %s\n", 
                percent_vars[row_idx], 
                outcome_vars[col_idx],
                correlation_results[row_idx, col_idx],
                p_values[row_idx, col_idx],
                significance_level))
  }
} else {
  cat("No significant correlations found (p < 0.05)\n")
}

# Create heatmap visualization (if ggplot2 package is available)
if (require(ggplot2) && require(reshape2)) {
  # Correlation coefficient heatmap
  cor_melted <- melt(correlation_results)
  names(cor_melted) <- c("Percent", "Outcome", "Correlation")
  
  # Add significance stars
  p_melted <- melt(p_values)
  names(p_melted) <- c("Percent", "Outcome", "P_value")
  
  # Create significance labels
  p_melted$significance <- ifelse(p_melted$P_value < 0.001, "***",
                                 ifelse(p_melted$P_value < 0.01, "**",
                                       ifelse(p_melted$P_value < 0.05, "*", "")))
  
  # Merge correlation and significance data
  plot_data <- merge(cor_melted, p_melted, by = c("Percent", "Outcome"))
  
  p1 <- ggplot(plot_data, aes(x = Outcome, y = Percent, fill = Correlation)) +
    geom_tile() +
    geom_text(aes(label = significance), color = "black", size = 5, vjust = 0.5) +
    scale_fill_gradient2(low = "blue", mid = "white", high = "red", 
                         midpoint = 0, limit = c(-1, 1)) +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1)) +
    labs(title = "Correlation Coefficient Heatmap", 
         x = "Outcome Variables", 
         y = "Percent Variables",
         fill = "Correlation\nCoefficient",
         caption = "* p < 0.05, ** p < 0.01, *** p < 0.001")
  
  print(p1)
  
  # P-value heatmap
  p2 <- ggplot(p_melted, aes(x = Outcome, y = Percent, fill = P_value)) +
    geom_tile() +
    geom_text(aes(label = significance), color = "black", size = 5, vjust = 0.5) +
    scale_fill_gradient(low = "red", high = "white", limit = c(0, 1)) +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1)) +
    labs(title = "P-value Heatmap", 
         x = "Outcome Variables", 
         y = "Percent Variables",
         fill = "P-value",
         caption = "* p < 0.05, ** p < 0.01, *** p < 0.001")
  
  print(p2)
}
```


```{r}
cor.test(result_Th$Threshold,result_Th$max_RT_percent)
```

```{r}
result_RT <- result_Th
cor.test(as.numeric(result_RT$percent_0),result_RT$AQ)
cor.test(as.numeric(result_RT$percent_10),result_RT$AQ)
cor.test(as.numeric(result_RT$percent_20),result_RT$AQ)
cor.test(as.numeric(result_RT$percent_30),result_RT$AQ)
cor.test(as.numeric(result_RT$percent_35),result_RT$AQ)
cor.test(as.numeric(result_RT$percent_40),result_RT$AQ)
cor.test(as.numeric(result_RT$percent_45),result_RT$AQ)
cor.test(as.numeric(result_RT$percent_50),result_RT$AQ)
cor.test(as.numeric(result_RT$percent_55),result_RT$AQ)
cor.test(as.numeric(result_RT$percent_60),result_RT$AQ)
cor.test(as.numeric(result_RT$percent_65),result_RT$AQ)
cor.test(as.numeric(result_RT$percent_70),result_RT$AQ)
cor.test(as.numeric(result_RT$percent_80),result_RT$AQ)
cor.test(as.numeric(result_RT$percent_90),result_RT$AQ)
cor.test(as.numeric(result_RT$percent_100),result_RT$AQ)
```


```{r}
# 加载必要的包
library(lme4)
library(lmerTest)  
library(emmeans)   
library(sjPlot)    
library(performance) 

# 准备数据
Th <- result_Th %>%
  select(No, order, gender, condition, RT_mean)

# 确保因子变量正确编码
Th$No <- as.factor(Th$No)
Th$order <- as.factor(Th$order)
Th$gender <- as.factor(Th$gender)
Th$condition <- as.factor(Th$condition)

# 建立线性混合模型
# No作为随机效应(被试内变量)
# condition作为被试内固定效应
model <- lmer(RT_mean ~ order + condition + order:condition + (1|No), 
                    data = Th, REML = TRUE)
summary(model)
```
```{r}
# 为result_Th数据添加session列（任务位置）
library(dplyr)

# 方法1：使用case_when添加session列
result_Th <- result_Th %>%
  mutate(
    session = case_when(
      # fu顺序：f(位置1) → u1(位置2) → u2(位置3)
      order == "fu" & condition == "f" ~ 1,
      order == "fu" & condition == "u1" ~ 2,
      order == "fu" & condition == "u2" ~ 3,
      # uf顺序：u1(位置1) → f(位置2) → u2(位置3)
      order == "uf" & condition == "u1" ~ 1,
      order == "uf" & condition == "f" ~ 2,
      order == "uf" & condition == "u2" ~ 3
    )
  )

learning_model <- lmer(RT_mean ~ session + (1|No), data = result_Th)
summary(learning_model)

# 2. 排除学习效应后的条件差异
condition_model <- lmer(RT_mean ~ condition + session + (1|No), data = result_Th)
summary(condition_model)
```
```{r}
# 关键模型：检验session×order交互
model_test <- lmer(RT_mean ~ session + order + session:order + (1|No), 
                   data = result_Th)
summary(model_test)

# 基于学习效应差异的最终分析模型
library(lme4)
library(lmerTest)
library(emmeans)

# 最终模型：控制不同的学习效应，分析条件差异
final_model <- lmer(RT_mean ~ condition + session + order + session:order + 
                    (1|No), data = result_Th)

print("=== 最终模型：控制学习效应后的条件差异 ===")
summary(final_model)

# 提取排除学习效应后的条件差异
print("\n=== 边际均值分析（控制学习效应） ===")
condition_emmeans <- emmeans(final_model, "condition")
print("各条件的边际均值（已控制session和order效应）:")
print(condition_emmeans)

print("\n=== 条件间配对比较（排除学习效应） ===")
condition_contrasts <- pairs(condition_emmeans)
print(condition_contrasts)

# 可视化学习曲线的差异
print("\n=== 学习曲线预测值 ===")
session_order_emmeans <- emmeans(final_model, ~ session | order)
print("各顺序组在不同session的预测均值:")
print(session_order_emmeans)

# 计算具体的学习效应
print("\n=== 学习效应计算 ===")
# fu组：session从1到3的变化
fu_learning <- -83.287 * 2  # session变化2个单位(1→3)
print(paste("FU组学习效应 (session 1→3):", round(fu_learning, 2), "ms"))

# uf组：考虑交互效应
uf_learning <- (-83.287 + 23.972) * 2  # session变化2个单位
print(paste("UF组学习效应 (session 1→3):", round(uf_learning, 2), "ms"))

print(paste("学习效应差异:", round(abs(fu_learning - uf_learning), 2), "ms"))

# 检查模型拟合
print("\n=== 模型比较 ===")
# 简单模型（假设学习效应相同）
simple_model <- lmer(RT_mean ~ condition + session + order + (1|No), 
                     data = result_Th)

# 模型比较
anova_comparison <- anova(simple_model, final_model)
print("模型比较（是否需要保留学习效应差异）:")
print(anova_comparison)

# 如果p < 0.1，建议使用复杂模型（考虑学习效应差异）
if(anova_comparison$`Pr(>Chisq)`[2] < 0.1) {
  print("建议: 保留session:order交互效应")
  print("结论: 两个顺序组的学习效应确实不同")
} else {
  print("建议: 可以使用简化模型")
  print("结论: 学习效应差异不显著")
}

print("\n=== 最终解释 ===")
print("1. 存在显著的学习效应（session主效应）")
print("2. 两个顺序组的学习效应有差异（交互效应边缘显著）")
print("3. 控制学习效应后，可以获得条件的纯差异")
print("4. 这种方法成功分离了学习效应和条件效应")
```

```{r}
write.csv(result_Th, file = "result_Th.csv", row.names = TRUE)
```

```{r}
# 加载必要的包
library(ggplot2)
library(gridExtra)
library(dplyr)

# 抑制geom_smooth的警告信息
options(warn = -1)  # 临时抑制警告

# 定义一个函数来进行相关性分析并生成图表
create_correlation_plot <- function(data, x_var, y_var, x_label, y_label) {
  # 进行相关性检验
  cor_result <- cor.test(data[[x_var]], data[[y_var]])
  
  # 打印相关性结果
  cat("\n=== ", x_label, " vs ", y_label, " ===\n")
  cat("Correlation coefficient (r):", round(cor_result$estimate, 4), "\n")
  cat("95% Confidence Interval:", round(cor_result$conf.int, 4), "\n")
  cat("t-statistic:", round(cor_result$statistic, 4), "\n")
  cat("p-value:", format(cor_result$p.value, scientific = TRUE), "\n")
  cat("Significance:", ifelse(cor_result$p.value < 0.001, "***", 
                            ifelse(cor_result$p.value < 0.01, "**",
                                  ifelse(cor_result$p.value < 0.05, "*", "ns"))), "\n")
  
  # 格式化p值显示
  p_formatted <- if(cor_result$p.value < 0.001) {
    "< 0.001"
  } else if(cor_result$p.value < 0.01) {
    sprintf("= %.3f", cor_result$p.value)
  } else {
    sprintf("= %.3f", cor_result$p.value)
  }
  
  # 创建散点图
  p <- ggplot(data, aes_string(x = x_var, y = y_var)) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.6, size = 2.5, color = "steelblue") +
    geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE, color = "red", alpha = 0.3, formula = y ~ x) +
    labs(
      x = x_label,
      y = y_label,
      title = paste("Correlation:", x_label, "vs", y_label),
      subtitle = paste("r =", round(cor_result$estimate, 3), 
                      ", p", p_formatted,
                      ifelse(cor_result$p.value < 0.001, " ***", 
                            ifelse(cor_result$p.value < 0.01, " **",
                                  ifelse(cor_result$p.value < 0.05, " *", ""))))
    ) +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme(
      plot.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),
      plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 10, color = "gray50"),
      axis.title = element_text(size = 11),
      axis.text = element_text(size = 10)
    )
  
  return(list(plot = p, correlation = cor_result))
}

# 进行所有相关性分析并生成图表
correlations <- list()

# 1. AQ vs look
result1 <- create_correlation_plot(result_Th, "AQ", "RT_mean", "AQ Score", "RT_mean")
correlations$AQ <- result1

# 2. social vs look
result2 <- create_correlation_plot(result_Th, "social", "RT_mean", "Social Score", "RT_mean")
correlations$social <- result2

# 3. attention_switching vs look
result3 <- create_correlation_plot(result_Th, "attention_switching", "RT_mean", "Attention Switching", "RT_mean")
correlations$attention_switching <- result3

# 4. local_attention vs look
result4 <- create_correlation_plot(result_Th, "local_attention", "RT_mean", "Local Attention", "RT_mean")
correlations$local_attention <- result4

# 5. communication vs look
result5 <- create_correlation_plot(result_Th, "communication", "RT_mean", "Communication", "RT_mean")
correlations$communication <- result5

# 6. imagination vs look
result6 <- create_correlation_plot(result_Th, "imagination", "RT_mean", "Imagination", "RT_mean")
correlations$imagination <- result6

# 7. PI20 vs look
result7 <- create_correlation_plot(result_Th, "PI20", "RT_mean", "PI20 Score", "RT_mean")
correlations$PI20 <- result7

# 8. Friendship vs look
result8 <- create_correlation_plot(result_Th, "Friendship", "RT_mean", "Friendship Score", "RT_mean")
correlations$Friendship <- result8

# 提取所有图表
plots <- lapply(correlations, function(x) x$plot)

# 在RStudio中单独显示每个图表
cat("\n=== DISPLAYING INDIVIDUAL PLOTS ===\n")

# 1. AQ vs look
cat("Displaying Plot 1: AQ Score vs Look Behavior\n")
print(plots$AQ)

# 2. social vs look  
cat("Displaying Plot 2: Social Score vs Look Behavior\n")
print(plots$social)

# 3. attention_switching vs look
cat("Displaying Plot 3: Attention Switching vs Look Behavior\n")
print(plots$attention_switching)

# 4. local_attention vs look
cat("Displaying Plot 4: Local Attention vs Look Behavior\n")
print(plots$local_attention)

# 5. communication vs look
cat("Displaying Plot 5: Communication vs Look Behavior\n")
print(plots$communication)

# 6. imagination vs look
cat("Displaying Plot 6: Imagination vs Look Behavior\n")
print(plots$imagination)

# 7. PI20 vs look
cat("Displaying Plot 7: PI20 Score vs Look Behavior\n")
print(plots$PI20)

# 8. Friendship vs look
cat("Displaying Plot 8: Friendship Score vs Look Behavior\n")
print(plots$Friendship)

# 可选：如果需要保存单独的图表文件
save_individual_plots <- TRUE  # 设置为FALSE如果不需要保存

if(save_individual_plots) {
  cat("\n=== SAVING INDIVIDUAL PLOTS ===\n")
  
  # 保存每个图表为单独的PNG文件
  ggsave("plot_AQ_vs_look.png", plots$AQ, width = 8, height = 6, dpi = 300)
  ggsave("plot_social_vs_look.png", plots$social, width = 8, height = 6, dpi = 300)
  ggsave("plot_attention_switching_vs_look.png", plots$attention_switching, width = 8, height = 6, dpi = 300)
  ggsave("plot_local_attention_vs_look.png", plots$local_attention, width = 8, height = 6, dpi = 300)
  ggsave("plot_communication_vs_look.png", plots$communication, width = 8, height = 6, dpi = 300)
  ggsave("plot_imagination_vs_look.png", plots$imagination, width = 8, height = 6, dpi = 300)
  ggsave("plot_PI20_vs_look.png", plots$PI20, width = 8, height = 6, dpi = 300)
  ggsave("plot_friendship_vs_look.png", plots$Friendship, width = 8, height = 6, dpi = 300)
  
  cat("Individual plot files saved\n")
}

# 可选：创建组合图表（如果需要）
create_combined_plot <- FALSE  # 设置为TRUE如果需要组合图表

if(create_combined_plot) {
  # 创建2x4的网格布局
  grid_plot <- grid.arrange(grobs = plots, ncol = 2, nrow = 4,
                           top = "Correlation Analysis: Various Measures vs Look Behavior")
  
  # 保存组合图表
  ggsave("correlation_analysis_grid.png", grid_plot, width = 12, height = 16, dpi = 300)
  cat("Combined grid plot saved as correlation_analysis_grid.png\n")
}

# 创建相关性系数汇总表
correlation_summary <- data.frame(
  Variable = names(correlations),
  Correlation = sapply(correlations, function(x) round(x$correlation$estimate, 4)),
  P_value = sapply(correlations, function(x) format(x$correlation$p.value, scientific = TRUE)),
  Significance = sapply(correlations, function(x) {
    p_val <- x$correlation$p.value
    ifelse(p_val < 0.001, "***", 
           ifelse(p_val < 0.01, "**",
                  ifelse(p_val < 0.05, "*", "ns")))
  }),
  CI_lower = sapply(correlations, function(x) round(x$correlation$conf.int[1], 4)),
  CI_upper = sapply(correlations, function(x) round(x$correlation$conf.int[2], 4))
)

print("\n=== CORRELATION SUMMARY TABLE ===")
print(correlation_summary)

# 保存汇总表
write.csv(correlation_summary, "correlation_summary.csv", row.names = FALSE)

cat("\n=== ANALYSIS COMPLETE ===\n")
cat("Individual plots created and combined into grid layout\n")
cat("Files saved:\n")
cat("- correlation_analysis_grid.png (combined plot)\n")
cat("- correlation_summary.csv (summary table)\n")

# 恢复警告设置
options(warn = 0)
```
```{r}
# 按order和condition分组（修正了原代码中的错误）
group_uf_f <- subset(result_Th, order == "uf" & condition == "f")
group_uf_u1 <- subset(result_Th, order == "uf" & condition == "u1")
group_uf_u2 <- subset(result_Th, order == "uf" & condition == "u2")
group_fu_f <- subset(result_Th, order == "fu" & condition == "f")
group_fu_u1 <- subset(result_Th, order == "fu" & condition == "u1")  # 修正：原来错误地写成了group_fu_f
group_fu_u2 <- subset(result_Th, order == "fu" & condition == "u2")  # 修正：原来错误地写成了group_fu_f

# 定义要分析的变量
variables <- c("AQ", "social", "attention_switching", "local_attention", 
               "communication", "imagination", "Friendship", "PI20")

# 定义组列表
groups <- list(
  "uf_f" = group_uf_f,
  "uf_u1" = group_uf_u1,
  "uf_u2" = group_uf_u2,
  "fu_f" = group_fu_f,
  "fu_u1" = group_fu_u1,
  "fu_u2" = group_fu_u2
)

# 创建函数来进行相关分析并格式化输出
perform_correlation_analysis <- function(group_data, group_name) {
  cat("\n=== ", group_name, " 组相关分析结果 ===\n")
  cat("样本量: ", nrow(group_data), "\n\n")
  
  # 存储结果
  results <- data.frame(
    Variable = character(),
    r = numeric(),
    p_value = numeric(),
    CI_lower = numeric(),
    CI_upper = numeric(),
    Significance = character(),
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
  
  for (var in variables) {
    if (var %in% names(group_data) && !all(is.na(group_data[[var]]))) {
      test_result <- cor.test(group_data$RT_mean, group_data[[var]], 
                             method = "pearson", conf.level = 0.95)
      
      # 判断显著性
      sig_level <- ifelse(test_result$p.value < 0.001, "***",
                         ifelse(test_result$p.value < 0.01, "**",
                               ifelse(test_result$p.value < 0.05, "*", "ns")))
      
      # 添加到结果数据框
      results <- rbind(results, data.frame(
        Variable = var,
        r = round(test_result$estimate, 3),
        p_value = round(test_result$p.value, 4),
        CI_lower = round(test_result$conf.int[1], 3),
        CI_upper = round(test_result$conf.int[2], 3),
        Significance = sig_level,
        stringsAsFactors = FALSE
      ))
    } else {
      cat("警告: 变量", var, "不存在或全为NA值\n")
    }
  }
  
  # 按p值排序
  results <- results[order(results$p_value), ]
  
  # 打印格式化的表格
  cat("变量\t\t\tr\t\tp值\t\t95%CI\t\t\t显著性\n")
  cat("-----------------------------------------------------------------------\n")
  
  for (i in 1:nrow(results)) {
    cat(sprintf("%-20s\t%.3f\t\t%.4f\t\t[%.3f, %.3f]\t\t%s\n",
                results$Variable[i],
                results$r[i],
                results$p_value[i],
                results$CI_lower[i],
                results$CI_upper[i],
                results$Significance[i]))
  }
  
  # 显著结果总结
  sig_results <- results[results$Significance != "ns", ]
  if (nrow(sig_results) > 0) {
    cat("\n显著相关结果:\n")
    for (i in 1:nrow(sig_results)) {
      direction <- ifelse(sig_results$r[i] > 0, "正相关", "负相关")
      cat(sprintf("- %s: %s (r = %.3f, p = %.4f)\n", 
                  sig_results$Variable[i], direction, 
                  sig_results$r[i], sig_results$p_value[i]))
    }
  } else {
    cat("\n没有发现显著相关关系\n")
  }
  
  return(results)
}

# 对所有组进行分析
all_results <- list()

for (group_name in names(groups)) {
  all_results[[group_name]] <- perform_correlation_analysis(groups[[group_name]], group_name)
}

# 生成总结报告
cat("\n\n=== 总结报告 ===\n")
cat("各组显著相关结果汇总:\n\n")

for (group_name in names(all_results)) {
  results <- all_results[[group_name]]
  sig_results <- results[results$Significance != "ns", ]
  
  cat(group_name, "组 (n=", nrow(groups[[group_name]]), "):\n", sep="")
  
  if (nrow(sig_results) > 0) {
    for (i in 1:nrow(sig_results)) {
      cat(sprintf("  - %s: r = %.3f, p = %.4f %s\n", 
                  sig_results$Variable[i], 
                  sig_results$r[i], 
                  sig_results$p_value[i],
                  sig_results$Significance[i]))
    }
  } else {
    cat("  - 无显著相关\n")
  }
  cat("\n")
}

# 可选：创建一个汇总矩阵显示所有相关系数
cat("=== 相关系数矩阵 (所有组) ===\n")
summary_matrix <- matrix(nrow = length(variables), ncol = length(groups))
rownames(summary_matrix) <- variables
colnames(summary_matrix) <- names(groups)

for (group_name in names(all_results)) {
  results <- all_results[[group_name]]
  for (i in 1:nrow(results)) {
    var_name <- results$Variable[i]
    summary_matrix[var_name, group_name] <- results$r[i]
  }
}

print(round(summary_matrix, 3))

# 显著性标记说明
cat("\n\n显著性标记说明:\n")
cat("*** p < 0.001\n")
cat("**  p < 0.01\n")
cat("*   p < 0.05\n")
cat("ns  p ≥ 0.05 (不显著)\n")
```
```{r}
# 加载必要的包
library(lme4)
library(lmerTest)  
library(emmeans)   
library(sjPlot)    
library(performance) 

# 准备数据
Th <- result_Th %>%
  select(No, order, gender, condition, RT_mean)

# 确保因子变量正确编码
Th$No <- as.factor(Th$No)
Th$order <- as.factor(Th$order)
Th$gender <- as.factor(Th$gender)
Th$condition <- as.factor(Th$condition)

# 建立线性混合模型
# No作为随机效应(被试内变量)
# order和gender作为被试间固定效应
# condition作为被试内固定效应
model0 <- lmer(RT_mean ~ order * gender * condition + (1|No), 
              data = Th,
              REML = TRUE)

model1 <- lmer(RT_mean ~ order + gender + condition + order:condition + (1|No), 
                    data = Th, REML = TRUE)

model2 <- lmer(RT_mean ~ order + condition + order:condition + (1|No), 
                    data = Th, REML = TRUE)
anova(model0,model1,model2)
summary(model2)
```


```{r}
result_new <- result_Th %>%
  # 按No分组
  group_by(No) %>%
  # 将condition相关的列进行透视
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = condition,
    values_from = c(Threshold, Width, Slope, RT_mean),
    names_sep = "_"
  ) %>%
  # 取消分组
  ungroup() %>%
  # 添加三个模式判断列
  mutate(
    # Threshold模式判断
    Threshold_pattern = case_when(
      order == "uf" ~ case_when(
        Threshold_u1 < Threshold_f & Threshold_f < Threshold_u2 ~ "uu",
        Threshold_u1 > Threshold_f & Threshold_f < Threshold_u2 ~ "du", 
        Threshold_u1 > Threshold_f & Threshold_f > Threshold_u2 ~ "dd",
        Threshold_u1 < Threshold_f & Threshold_f > Threshold_u2 ~ "ud",
        TRUE ~ "other"
      ),
      order == "fu" ~ case_when(
        Threshold_f < Threshold_u1 & Threshold_u1 < Threshold_u2 ~ "uu",
        Threshold_f > Threshold_u1 & Threshold_u1 < Threshold_u2 ~ "du",
        Threshold_f > Threshold_u1 & Threshold_u1 > Threshold_u2 ~ "dd", 
        Threshold_f < Threshold_u1 & Threshold_u1 > Threshold_u2 ~ "ud",
        TRUE ~ "other"
      ),
      TRUE ~ "unknown_order"
    ),
    
    # Width模式判断
    Width_pattern = case_when(
      order == "uf" ~ case_when(
        Width_u1 < Width_f & Width_f < Width_u2 ~ "uu",
        Width_u1 > Width_f & Width_f < Width_u2 ~ "du",
        Width_u1 > Width_f & Width_f > Width_u2 ~ "dd",
        Width_u1 < Width_f & Width_f > Width_u2 ~ "ud",
        TRUE ~ "other"
      ),
      order == "fu" ~ case_when(
        Width_f < Width_u1 & Width_u1 < Width_u2 ~ "uu",
        Width_f > Width_u1 & Width_u1 < Width_u2 ~ "du",
        Width_f > Width_u1 & Width_u1 > Width_u2 ~ "dd",
        Width_f < Width_u1 & Width_u1 > Width_u2 ~ "ud",
        TRUE ~ "other"
      ),
      TRUE ~ "unknown_order"
    ),
    
    # RT_mean模式判断  
    RT_mean_pattern = case_when(
      order == "uf" ~ case_when(
        RT_mean_u1 < RT_mean_f & RT_mean_f < RT_mean_u2 ~ "uu",
        RT_mean_u1 > RT_mean_f & RT_mean_f < RT_mean_u2 ~ "du",
        RT_mean_u1 > RT_mean_f & RT_mean_f > RT_mean_u2 ~ "dd",
        RT_mean_u1 < RT_mean_f & RT_mean_f > RT_mean_u2 ~ "ud", 
        TRUE ~ "other"
      ),
      order == "fu" ~ case_when(
        RT_mean_f < RT_mean_u1 & RT_mean_u1 < RT_mean_u2 ~ "uu",
        RT_mean_f > RT_mean_u1 & RT_mean_u1 < RT_mean_u2 ~ "du",
        RT_mean_f > RT_mean_u1 & RT_mean_u1 > RT_mean_u2 ~ "dd",
        RT_mean_f < RT_mean_u1 & RT_mean_u1 > RT_mean_u2 ~ "ud",
        TRUE ~ "other"
      ),
      TRUE ~ "unknown_order"
    ),
    
    # 添加三个数组列，每个包含两个差值参数
    # Threshold差值数组 [第一段差值, 第二段差值]
    Threshold_diffs = case_when(
      order == "uf" ~ paste0("[", round(Threshold_f - Threshold_u1, 4), ", ", round(Threshold_u2 - Threshold_f, 4), "]"),
      order == "fu" ~ paste0("[", round(Threshold_u1 - Threshold_f, 4), ", ", round(Threshold_u2 - Threshold_u1, 4), "]"),
      TRUE ~ "[NA, NA]"
    ),
    
    # Width差值数组 [第一段差值, 第二段差值] 
    Width_diffs = case_when(
      order == "uf" ~ paste0("[", round(Width_f - Width_u1, 4), ", ", round(Width_u2 - Width_f, 4), "]"),
      order == "fu" ~ paste0("[", round(Width_u1 - Width_f, 4), ", ", round(Width_u2 - Width_u1, 4), "]"),
      TRUE ~ "[NA, NA]"
    ),
    
    # RT_mean差值数组 [第一段差值, 第二段差值]
    RT_mean_diffs = case_when(
      order == "uf" ~ paste0("[", round(RT_mean_f - RT_mean_u1, 4), ", ", round(RT_mean_u2 - RT_mean_f, 4), "]"),
      order == "fu" ~ paste0("[", round(RT_mean_u1 - RT_mean_f, 4), ", ", round(RT_mean_u2 - RT_mean_u1, 4), "]"),
      TRUE ~ "[NA, NA]"
    )
  )
```


```{r}
# 输出到CSV文件
write.csv(result_new, "result_Th_reshaped.csv", row.names = FALSE, fileEncoding = "UTF-8")
print("数据已保存到: result_Th_reshaped.csv")
```


```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(stringr)

Th_diffs <- result_new %>%
  select(No, AQ, Threshold_diffs,social,attention_switching,	local_attention,	communication,	imagination,Friendship,PI20) %>%
  mutate(
    # 移除方括号并按逗号分割
    Threshold_diff1 = as.numeric(str_extract(Threshold_diffs, "(?<=\\[)[^,]+")),
    Threshold_diff2 = as.numeric(str_extract(Threshold_diffs, "(?<=,\\s)[^\\]]+"))
  ) %>%
  select(No, AQ, Threshold_diff1, Threshold_diff2,social,attention_switching,	local_attention,	communication,	imagination,Friendship,PI20)

cor.test(Th_diffs$AQ,Th_diffs$Threshold_diff1)
cor.test(Th_diffs$AQ,Th_diffs$Threshold_diff2)
cor.test(Th_diffs$social,Th_diffs$Threshold_diff1)
cor.test(Th_diffs$social,Th_diffs$Threshold_diff2)
cor.test(Th_diffs$attention_switching,Th_diffs$Threshold_diff1)
cor.test(Th_diffs$attention_switching,Th_diffs$Threshold_diff2)
cor.test(Th_diffs$local_attention,Th_diffs$Threshold_diff1)
cor.test(Th_diffs$local_attention,Th_diffs$Threshold_diff2)
cor.test(Th_diffs$communication,Th_diffs$Threshold_diff1)
cor.test(Th_diffs$communication,Th_diffs$Threshold_diff2)
cor.test(Th_diffs$imagination,Th_diffs$Threshold_diff1)
cor.test(Th_diffs$imagination,Th_diffs$Threshold_diff2)
cor.test(Th_diffs$Friendship,Th_diffs$Threshold_diff1)
cor.test(Th_diffs$Friendship,Th_diffs$Threshold_diff2)
cor.test(Th_diffs$PI20,Th_diffs$Threshold_diff1)
cor.test(Th_diffs$PI20,Th_diffs$Threshold_diff2)
```

```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(stringr)
Th_diffs <- result_new %>%
  select(No, AQ, Width_diffs,social,attention_switching, local_attention, communication, imagination,Friendship,PI20) %>%
  mutate(
    # 移除方括号并按逗号分割
    Width_diff1 = as.numeric(str_extract(Width_diffs, "(?<=\\[)[^,]+")),
    Width_diff2 = as.numeric(str_extract(Width_diffs, "(?<=,\\s)[^\\]]+"))
  ) %>%
  select(No, AQ, Width_diff1, Width_diff2,social,attention_switching, local_attention, communication, imagination,Friendship,PI20)
cor.test(Th_diffs$AQ,Th_diffs$Width_diff1)
cor.test(Th_diffs$AQ,Th_diffs$Width_diff2)
cor.test(Th_diffs$social,Th_diffs$Width_diff1)
cor.test(Th_diffs$social,Th_diffs$Width_diff2)
cor.test(Th_diffs$attention_switching,Th_diffs$Width_diff1)
cor.test(Th_diffs$attention_switching,Th_diffs$Width_diff2)
cor.test(Th_diffs$local_attention,Th_diffs$Width_diff1)
cor.test(Th_diffs$local_attention,Th_diffs$Width_diff2)
cor.test(Th_diffs$communication,Th_diffs$Width_diff1)
cor.test(Th_diffs$communication,Th_diffs$Width_diff2)
cor.test(Th_diffs$imagination,Th_diffs$Width_diff1)
cor.test(Th_diffs$imagination,Th_diffs$Width_diff2)
cor.test(Th_diffs$Friendship,Th_diffs$Width_diff1)
cor.test(Th_diffs$Friendship,Th_diffs$Width_diff2)
cor.test(Th_diffs$PI20,Th_diffs$Width_diff1)
cor.test(Th_diffs$PI20,Th_diffs$Width_diff2)
```
```{r}
# 创建分组变量
result_new$group <- paste(result_new$order, result_new$gender, sep = "_")
result_new$group2 <- paste(result_new$order)

# 分组
grouped_list <- split(result_new, result_new$group)
grouped_list2 <- split(result_new, result_new$group2)

# 访问各组
uf_f <- grouped_list$uf_f  # order=uf, gender=f
uf_m <- grouped_list$uf_m  # order=uf, gender=m
fu_f <- grouped_list$fu_f  # order=fu, gender=f
fu_m <- grouped_list$fu_m  # order=fu, gender=m

fu <- grouped_list2$fu
uf <- grouped_list2$uf
```

```{r}
# 抑制geom_smooth的警告信息
options(warn = -1)  # 临时抑制警告

# 定义一个函数来进行相关性分析并生成图表
create_correlation_plot <- function(data, x_var, y_var, x_label, y_label) {
  # 进行相关性检验
  cor_result <- cor.test(data[[x_var]], data[[y_var]])
  
  # 打印相关性结果
  cat("\n=== ", x_label, " vs ", y_label, " ===\n")
  cat("Correlation coefficient (r):", round(cor_result$estimate, 4), "\n")
  cat("95% Confidence Interval:", round(cor_result$conf.int, 4), "\n")
  cat("t-statistic:", round(cor_result$statistic, 4), "\n")
  cat("p-value:", format(cor_result$p.value, scientific = TRUE), "\n")
  cat("Significance:", ifelse(cor_result$p.value < 0.001, "***", 
                            ifelse(cor_result$p.value < 0.01, "**",
                                  ifelse(cor_result$p.value < 0.05, "*", "ns"))), "\n")
  
  # 格式化p值显示
  p_formatted <- if(cor_result$p.value < 0.001) {
    "< 0.001"
  } else if(cor_result$p.value < 0.01) {
    sprintf("= %.3f", cor_result$p.value)
  } else {
    sprintf("= %.3f", cor_result$p.value)
  }
  
  # 创建散点图
  p <- ggplot(data, aes_string(x = x_var, y = y_var)) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.6, size = 2.5, color = "steelblue") +
    geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE, color = "red", alpha = 0.3, formula = y ~ x) +
    labs(
      x = x_label,
      y = y_label,
      title = paste("Correlation:", x_label, "vs", y_label),
      subtitle = paste("r =", round(cor_result$estimate, 3), 
                      ", p", p_formatted,
                      ifelse(cor_result$p.value < 0.001, " ***", 
                            ifelse(cor_result$p.value < 0.01, " **",
                                  ifelse(cor_result$p.value < 0.05, " *", ""))))
    ) +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme(
      plot.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),
      plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 10, color = "gray50"),
      axis.title = element_text(size = 11),
      axis.text = element_text(size = 10)
    )
  
  return(list(plot = p, correlation = cor_result))
}

library(dplyr)
library(stringr)
library(ggplot2)

# Data preprocessing
Th_diffs <- uf_f %>%
  select(No, AQ, Threshold_diffs, social, attention_switching, local_attention, 
         communication, imagination, Friendship, PI20) %>%
  mutate(
    # Remove brackets and split by comma
    Threshold_diff1 = as.numeric(str_extract(Threshold_diffs, "(?<=\\[)[^,]+")),
    Threshold_diff2 = as.numeric(str_extract(Threshold_diffs, "(?<=,\\s)[^\\]]+"))
  ) %>%
  select(No, AQ, Threshold_diff1, Threshold_diff2, social, attention_switching, 
         local_attention, communication, imagination, Friendship, PI20)

# Define variables and labels
variables <- c("AQ", "social", "attention_switching", "local_attention", 
               "communication", "imagination", "Friendship", "PI20")
labels <- c("Autism Quotient (AQ)", "Social Skills", "Attention Switching", "Local Attention", 
            "Communication", "Imagination", "Friendship Quality", "PI20")

# Create lists to store results
results_diff1 <- list()
results_diff2 <- list()

# Correlation analysis for Threshold_diff1
cat("========== Threshold_diff1 Correlation Analysis ==========\n")
for(i in 1:length(variables)) {
  results_diff1[[i]] <- create_correlation_plot(
    data = Th_diffs,
    x_var = variables[i],
    y_var = "Threshold_diff1",
    x_label = labels[i],
    y_label = "Threshold Difference 1"
  )
}

# Correlation analysis for Threshold_diff2
cat("\n========== Threshold_diff2 Correlation Analysis ==========\n")
for(i in 1:length(variables)) {
  results_diff2[[i]] <- create_correlation_plot(
    data = Th_diffs,
    x_var = variables[i],
    y_var = "Threshold_diff2",
    x_label = labels[i],
    y_label = "Threshold Difference 2"
  )
}

# Display all plots - Threshold_diff1
cat("\n========== Displaying Threshold_diff1 Plots ==========\n")
for(i in 1:length(variables)) {
  print(results_diff1[[i]]$plot)
}

# Display all plots - Threshold_diff2
cat("\n========== Displaying Threshold_diff2 Plots ==========\n")
for(i in 1:length(variables)) {
  print(results_diff2[[i]]$plot)
}

# Create summary table
create_summary_table <- function(results, threshold_name) {
  summary_df <- data.frame(
    Variable = labels,
    r = sapply(results, function(x) round(x$correlation$estimate, 4)),
    p_value = sapply(results, function(x) x$correlation$p.value),
    CI_lower = sapply(results, function(x) round(x$correlation$conf.int[1], 4)),
    CI_upper = sapply(results, function(x) round(x$correlation$conf.int[2], 4)),
    Significance = sapply(results, function(x) {
      p <- x$correlation$p.value
      ifelse(p < 0.001, "***", 
             ifelse(p < 0.01, "**",
                    ifelse(p < 0.05, "*", "ns")))
    })
  )
  
  cat("\n========== ", threshold_name, " Correlation Summary Table ==========\n")
  print(summary_df)
  return(summary_df)
}

# Generate summary tables
summary_diff1 <- create_summary_table(results_diff1, "Threshold_diff1")
summary_diff2 <- create_summary_table(results_diff2, "Threshold_diff2")

# Optional: Save results to files
# write.csv(summary_diff1, "threshold_diff1_correlations.csv", row.names = FALSE)
# write.csv(summary_diff2, "threshold_diff2_correlations.csv", row.names = FALSE)

# Optional: Save all plots to PDF file
# pdf("correlation_plots.pdf", width = 10, height = 8)
# for(i in 1:length(variables)) {
#   print(results_diff1[[i]]$plot)
#   print(results_diff2[[i]]$plot)
# }
# dev.off()

# Restore warning settings
options(warn = 0)


```
```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(stringr)
library(ggplot2)

# Data preprocessing
Width_diffs <- uf %>%
  select(No, AQ, Width_diffs, social, attention_switching, local_attention, 
         communication, imagination, Friendship, PI20) %>%
  mutate(
    # Remove brackets and split by comma
    Width_diff1 = as.numeric(str_extract(Width_diffs, "(?<=\\[)[^,]+")),
    Width_diff2 = as.numeric(str_extract(Width_diffs, "(?<=,\\s)[^\\]]+"))
  ) %>%
  select(No, AQ, Width_diff1, Width_diff2, social, attention_switching, 
         local_attention, communication, imagination, Friendship, PI20)

# Define variables and labels
variables <- c("AQ", "social", "attention_switching", "local_attention", 
               "communication", "imagination", "Friendship", "PI20")
labels <- c("Autism Quotient (AQ)", "Social Skills", "Attention Switching", "Local Attention", 
            "Communication", "Imagination", "Friendship Quality", "PI20")

# Create lists to store results
results_diff1 <- list()
results_diff2 <- list()

# Correlation analysis for Width_diff1
cat("========== Width_diff1 Correlation Analysis ==========\n")
for(i in 1:length(variables)) {
  results_diff1[[i]] <- create_correlation_plot(
    data = Width_diffs,
    x_var = variables[i],
    y_var = "Width_diff1",
    x_label = labels[i],
    y_label = "Width Difference 1"
  )
}

# Correlation analysis for Width_diff2
cat("\n========== Width_diff2 Correlation Analysis ==========\n")
for(i in 1:length(variables)) {
  results_diff2[[i]] <- create_correlation_plot(
    data = Width_diffs,
    x_var = variables[i],
    y_var = "Width_diff2",
    x_label = labels[i],
    y_label = "Width Difference 2"
  )
}

# Display all plots - Width_diff1
cat("\n========== Displaying Width_diff1 Plots ==========\n")
for(i in 1:length(variables)) {
  print(results_diff1[[i]]$plot)
}

# Display all plots - Width_diff2
cat("\n========== Displaying Width_diff2 Plots ==========\n")
for(i in 1:length(variables)) {
  print(results_diff2[[i]]$plot)
}

# Create summary table
create_summary_table <- function(results, width_name) {
  summary_df <- data.frame(
    Variable = labels,
    r = sapply(results, function(x) round(x$correlation$estimate, 4)),
    p_value = sapply(results, function(x) x$correlation$p.value),
    CI_lower = sapply(results, function(x) round(x$correlation$conf.int[1], 4)),
    CI_upper = sapply(results, function(x) round(x$correlation$conf.int[2], 4)),
    Significance = sapply(results, function(x) {
      p <- x$correlation$p.value
      ifelse(p < 0.001, "***", 
             ifelse(p < 0.01, "**",
                    ifelse(p < 0.05, "*", "ns")))
    })
  )
  
  cat("\n========== ", width_name, " Correlation Summary Table ==========\n")
  print(summary_df)
  return(summary_df)
}

# Generate summary tables
summary_diff1 <- create_summary_table(results_diff1, "Width_diff1")
summary_diff2 <- create_summary_table(results_diff2, "Width_diff2")

# Optional: Save results to files
# write.csv(summary_diff1, "width_diff1_correlations.csv", row.names = FALSE)
# write.csv(summary_diff2, "width_diff2_correlations.csv", row.names = FALSE)

# Optional: Save all plots to PDF file
# pdf("correlation_plots.pdf", width = 10, height = 8)
# for(i in 1:length(variables)) {
#   print(results_diff1[[i]]$plot)
#   print(results_diff2[[i]]$plot)
# }
# dev.off()

# Restore warning settings
options(warn = 0)
```



```{r}
#uf_f <- grouped_list$uf_f  # order=uf, gender=f
#uf_m <- grouped_list$uf_m  # order=uf, gender=m
#fu_f <- grouped_list$fu_f  # order=fu, gender=f
#fu_m <- grouped_list$fu_m  # order=fu, gender=m
library(dplyr)
library(stringr)
Th_diffs <- fu_m%>%
  select(No, AQ, Width_diffs,social,attention_switching, local_attention, communication, imagination,Friendship,PI20) %>%
  mutate(
    # 移除方括号并按逗号分割
    Width_diff1 = as.numeric(str_extract(Width_diffs, "(?<=\\[)[^,]+")),
    Width_diff2 = as.numeric(str_extract(Width_diffs, "(?<=,\\s)[^\\]]+"))
  ) %>%
  select(No, AQ, Width_diff1, Width_diff2,social,attention_switching, local_attention, communication, imagination,Friendship,PI20)
cor.test(Th_diffs$AQ,Th_diffs$Width_diff1)
cor.test(Th_diffs$AQ,Th_diffs$Width_diff2)
cor.test(Th_diffs$social,Th_diffs$Width_diff1)
cor.test(Th_diffs$social,Th_diffs$Width_diff2)
cor.test(Th_diffs$attention_switching,Th_diffs$Width_diff1)
cor.test(Th_diffs$attention_switching,Th_diffs$Width_diff2)
cor.test(Th_diffs$local_attention,Th_diffs$Width_diff1)
cor.test(Th_diffs$local_attention,Th_diffs$Width_diff2)
cor.test(Th_diffs$communication,Th_diffs$Width_diff1)
cor.test(Th_diffs$communication,Th_diffs$Width_diff2)
cor.test(Th_diffs$imagination,Th_diffs$Width_diff1)
cor.test(Th_diffs$imagination,Th_diffs$Width_diff2)
cor.test(Th_diffs$Friendship,Th_diffs$Width_diff1)
cor.test(Th_diffs$Friendship,Th_diffs$Width_diff2)
cor.test(Th_diffs$PI20,Th_diffs$Width_diff1)
cor.test(Th_diffs$PI20,Th_diffs$Width_diff2)
```

```{r}
#result_look <- subset(result_Th, look != "#N/A")
#result_look$look <- as.numeric(result_look$look)

#mean_look <- mean(result_look$look, na.rm = TRUE)
#sd_look <- sd(result_look$look, na.rm = TRUE)

# 计算3倍标准差的上下界
#lower_bound <- mean_look - 3 * sd_look
#upper_bound <- mean_look + 3 * sd_look

# 创建新数据集，去除3SD之外的行
result_look <- result_Th
```

```{r}
result_look_clean <- subset(result_look, look_5080 != "#N/A")
result_look_clean <- subset(result_look, look_other != "#N/A")
group_uf <- subset(result_look_clean, order == "uf")  # uf
group_fu <- subset(result_look_clean, order == "fu")  # uf
result <- t.test(as.numeric(result_look_clean$look_5080), as.numeric(result_look_clean$look_other), paired = TRUE)
print(result)
result1 <- t.test(as.numeric(result_look_clean$look_100), as.numeric(result_look_clean$look_0), paired = TRUE)
print(result1)
cor.test(result_look_clean$AQ,as.numeric(result_look_clean$look_100)-as.numeric(result_look_clean$look_0))
```

```{r}
# 输出到CSV文件
write.csv(result_look_clean, "result_look_clean.csv", row.names = FALSE, fileEncoding = "UTF-8")
print("数据已保存到: result_look_clean.csv")
```
```{r}
# 创建参与者-条件计数矩阵
participant_condition_count <- table(result_look_clean$No, result_look_clean$condition)

# 找出在所有3个condition都有数据的参与者
complete_participants <- names(which(rowSums(participant_condition_count > 0) == 3))

# 筛选出完整数据
result_look_complete <- result_look_clean[result_look_clean$No %in% complete_participants, ]

cat("原始数据中的参与者数量:", length(unique(result_look_clean$No)), "\n")
cat("完整数据中的参与者数量:", length(complete_participants), "\n")
cat("每个condition的观测数量:\n")
print(table(result_look_complete$condition))
```


```{r}
# 加载必要的包
library(ggplot2)
library(gridExtra)
library(dplyr)

# 抑制geom_smooth的警告信息
options(warn = -1)  # 临时抑制警告

# 定义一个函数来进行相关性分析并生成图表
create_correlation_plot <- function(data, x_var, y_var, x_label, y_label) {
  # 进行相关性检验
  cor_result <- cor.test(data[[x_var]], data[[y_var]])
  
  # 打印相关性结果
  cat("\n=== ", x_label, " vs ", y_label, " ===\n")
  cat("Correlation coefficient (r):", round(cor_result$estimate, 4), "\n")
  cat("95% Confidence Interval:", round(cor_result$conf.int, 4), "\n")
  cat("t-statistic:", round(cor_result$statistic, 4), "\n")
  cat("p-value:", format(cor_result$p.value, scientific = TRUE), "\n")
  cat("Significance:", ifelse(cor_result$p.value < 0.001, "***", 
                            ifelse(cor_result$p.value < 0.01, "**",
                                  ifelse(cor_result$p.value < 0.05, "*", "ns"))), "\n")
  
  # 格式化p值显示
  p_formatted <- if(cor_result$p.value < 0.001) {
    "< 0.001"
  } else if(cor_result$p.value < 0.01) {
    sprintf("= %.3f", cor_result$p.value)
  } else {
    sprintf("= %.3f", cor_result$p.value)
  }
  
  # 创建散点图
  p <- ggplot(data, aes_string(x = x_var, y = y_var)) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.6, size = 2.5, color = "steelblue") +
    geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE, color = "red", alpha = 0.3, formula = y ~ x) +
    labs(
      x = x_label,
      y = y_label,
      title = paste("Correlation:", x_label, "vs", y_label),
      subtitle = paste("r =", round(cor_result$estimate, 3), 
                      ", p", p_formatted,
                      ifelse(cor_result$p.value < 0.001, " ***", 
                            ifelse(cor_result$p.value < 0.01, " **",
                                  ifelse(cor_result$p.value < 0.05, " *", ""))))
    ) +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme(
      plot.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),
      plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 10, color = "gray50"),
      axis.title = element_text(size = 11),
      axis.text = element_text(size = 10)
    )
  
  return(list(plot = p, correlation = cor_result))
}

# 进行所有相关性分析并生成图表
correlations <- list()

# 1. AQ vs look
result1 <- create_correlation_plot(result_look_complete, "AQ", "look", "AQ Score", "Look Behavior")
correlations$AQ <- result1

# 2. social vs look
result2 <- create_correlation_plot(result_look_complete, "social", "look", "Social Score", "Look Behavior")
correlations$social <- result2

# 3. attention_switching vs look
result3 <- create_correlation_plot(result_look_complete, "attention_switching", "look", "Attention Switching", "Look Behavior")
correlations$attention_switching <- result3

# 4. local_attention vs look
result4 <- create_correlation_plot(result_look_complete, "local_attention", "look", "Local Attention", "Look Behavior")
correlations$local_attention <- result4

# 5. communication vs look
result5 <- create_correlation_plot(result_look_complete, "communication", "look", "Communication", "Look Behavior")
correlations$communication <- result5

# 6. imagination vs look
result6 <- create_correlation_plot(result_look_complete, "imagination", "look", "Imagination", "Look Behavior")
correlations$imagination <- result6

# 7. PI20 vs look
result7 <- create_correlation_plot(result_look_complete, "PI20", "look", "PI20 Score", "Look Behavior")
correlations$PI20 <- result7

# 8. Friendship vs look
result8 <- create_correlation_plot(result_look_complete, "Friendship", "look", "Friendship Score", "Look Behavior")
correlations$Friendship <- result8

# 提取所有图表
plots <- lapply(correlations, function(x) x$plot)

# 在RStudio中单独显示每个图表
cat("\n=== DISPLAYING INDIVIDUAL PLOTS ===\n")

# 1. AQ vs look
cat("Displaying Plot 1: AQ Score vs Look Behavior\n")
print(plots$AQ)

# 2. social vs look  
cat("Displaying Plot 2: Social Score vs Look Behavior\n")
print(plots$social)

# 3. attention_switching vs look
cat("Displaying Plot 3: Attention Switching vs Look Behavior\n")
print(plots$attention_switching)

# 4. local_attention vs look
cat("Displaying Plot 4: Local Attention vs Look Behavior\n")
print(plots$local_attention)

# 5. communication vs look
cat("Displaying Plot 5: Communication vs Look Behavior\n")
print(plots$communication)

# 6. imagination vs look
cat("Displaying Plot 6: Imagination vs Look Behavior\n")
print(plots$imagination)

# 7. PI20 vs look
cat("Displaying Plot 7: PI20 Score vs Look Behavior\n")
print(plots$PI20)

# 8. Friendship vs look
cat("Displaying Plot 8: Friendship Score vs Look Behavior\n")
print(plots$Friendship)

# 可选：如果需要保存单独的图表文件
save_individual_plots <- TRUE  # 设置为FALSE如果不需要保存

if(save_individual_plots) {
  cat("\n=== SAVING INDIVIDUAL PLOTS ===\n")
  
  # 保存每个图表为单独的PNG文件
  ggsave("plot_AQ_vs_look.png", plots$AQ, width = 8, height = 6, dpi = 300)
  ggsave("plot_social_vs_look.png", plots$social, width = 8, height = 6, dpi = 300)
  ggsave("plot_attention_switching_vs_look.png", plots$attention_switching, width = 8, height = 6, dpi = 300)
  ggsave("plot_local_attention_vs_look.png", plots$local_attention, width = 8, height = 6, dpi = 300)
  ggsave("plot_communication_vs_look.png", plots$communication, width = 8, height = 6, dpi = 300)
  ggsave("plot_imagination_vs_look.png", plots$imagination, width = 8, height = 6, dpi = 300)
  ggsave("plot_PI20_vs_look.png", plots$PI20, width = 8, height = 6, dpi = 300)
  ggsave("plot_friendship_vs_look.png", plots$Friendship, width = 8, height = 6, dpi = 300)
  
  cat("Individual plot files saved\n")
}

# 可选：创建组合图表（如果需要）
create_combined_plot <- FALSE  # 设置为TRUE如果需要组合图表

if(create_combined_plot) {
  # 创建2x4的网格布局
  grid_plot <- grid.arrange(grobs = plots, ncol = 2, nrow = 4,
                           top = "Correlation Analysis: Various Measures vs Look Behavior")
  
  # 保存组合图表
  ggsave("correlation_analysis_grid.png", grid_plot, width = 12, height = 16, dpi = 300)
  cat("Combined grid plot saved as correlation_analysis_grid.png\n")
}

# 创建相关性系数汇总表
correlation_summary <- data.frame(
  Variable = names(correlations),
  Correlation = sapply(correlations, function(x) round(x$correlation$estimate, 4)),
  P_value = sapply(correlations, function(x) format(x$correlation$p.value, scientific = TRUE)),
  Significance = sapply(correlations, function(x) {
    p_val <- x$correlation$p.value
    ifelse(p_val < 0.001, "***", 
           ifelse(p_val < 0.01, "**",
                  ifelse(p_val < 0.05, "*", "ns")))
  }),
  CI_lower = sapply(correlations, function(x) round(x$correlation$conf.int[1], 4)),
  CI_upper = sapply(correlations, function(x) round(x$correlation$conf.int[2], 4))
)

print("\n=== CORRELATION SUMMARY TABLE ===")
print(correlation_summary)

# 保存汇总表
write.csv(correlation_summary, "correlation_summary.csv", row.names = FALSE)

cat("\n=== ANALYSIS COMPLETE ===\n")
cat("Individual plots created and combined into grid layout\n")
cat("Files saved:\n")
cat("- correlation_analysis_grid.png (combined plot)\n")
cat("- correlation_summary.csv (summary table)\n")

# 恢复警告设置
options(warn = 0)
```
```{r}
# 数据预处理：去除#N/A值并转换为数值型
result_look <- subset(result_Th, look_0 != "#N/A")
result_look <- subset(result_look, look_100 != "#N/A")
result_look <- subset(result_look, look_5080 != "#N/A")
result_look <- subset(result_look, look_100m0 != "#N/A")

result_look$look_0 <- as.numeric(result_look$look_0)
result_look$look_100 <- as.numeric(result_look$look_100)
result_look$look_5080 <- as.numeric(result_look$look_5080)
result_look$look_100m0 <- as.numeric(result_look$look_100m0)

group_uf_f <- subset(result_look, order == "uf" & gender == "f")  # uf + female
group_uf_m <- subset(result_look, order == "uf" & gender == "m")  # uf + male
group_fu_f <- subset(result_look, order == "fu" & gender == "f")  # fu + female
group_fu_m <- subset(result_look, order == "fu" & gender == "m")  # fu + male
```

```{r}
# 加载必要的包
library(ggplot2)
library(gridExtra)
library(dplyr)

# 抑制geom_smooth的警告信息
options(warn = -1)  # 临时抑制警告

# 定义一个函数来进行3SD异常值去除
remove_outliers_3sd <- function(data, column_name) {
  # 计算均值和标准差
  mean_val <- mean(data[[column_name]], na.rm = TRUE)
  sd_val <- sd(data[[column_name]], na.rm = TRUE)
  
  # 计算3SD边界
  lower_bound <- mean_val - 3 * sd_val
  upper_bound <- mean_val + 3 * sd_val
  
  # 筛选数据
  clean_data <- data[data[[column_name]] >= lower_bound & 
                     data[[column_name]] <= upper_bound, ]
  
  # 打印清理信息
  cat("=== Outlier Removal for", column_name, "===\n")
  cat("Original data points:", nrow(data), "\n")
  cat("Mean:", round(mean_val, 4), "\n")
  cat("SD:", round(sd_val, 4), "\n")
  cat("Lower bound (Mean - 3SD):", round(lower_bound, 4), "\n")
  cat("Upper bound (Mean + 3SD):", round(upper_bound, 4), "\n")
  cat("Outliers removed:", nrow(data) - nrow(clean_data), "\n")
  cat("Clean data points:", nrow(clean_data), "\n")
  cat("Percentage retained:", round(nrow(clean_data)/nrow(data)*100, 2), "%\n\n")
  
  return(clean_data)
}

# 定义一个函数来进行相关性分析并生成图表
create_correlation_plot <- function(data, x_var, y_var, x_label, y_label) {
  # 进行相关性检验
  cor_result <- cor.test(data[[x_var]], data[[y_var]])
  
  # 打印相关性结果
  cat("\n=== ", x_label, " vs ", y_label, " ===\n")
  cat("Correlation coefficient (r):", round(cor_result$estimate, 4), "\n")
  cat("95% Confidence Interval:", round(cor_result$conf.int, 4), "\n")
  cat("t-statistic:", round(cor_result$statistic, 4), "\n")
  cat("p-value:", format(cor_result$p.value, scientific = TRUE), "\n")
  cat("Significance:", ifelse(cor_result$p.value < 0.001, "***", 
                            ifelse(cor_result$p.value < 0.01, "**",
                                  ifelse(cor_result$p.value < 0.05, "*", "ns"))), "\n")
  
  # 格式化p值显示
  p_formatted <- if(cor_result$p.value < 0.001) {
    "< 0.001"
  } else if(cor_result$p.value < 0.01) {
    sprintf("= %.3f", cor_result$p.value)
  } else {
    sprintf("= %.3f", cor_result$p.value)
  }
  
  # 创建散点图
  p <- ggplot(data, aes_string(x = x_var, y = y_var)) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.6, size = 2.5, color = "steelblue") +
    geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE, color = "red", alpha = 0.3, formula = y ~ x) +
    labs(
      x = x_label,
      y = y_label,
      title = paste("Correlation:", x_label, "vs", y_label),
      subtitle = paste("r =", round(cor_result$estimate, 3), 
                      ", p", p_formatted,
                      ifelse(cor_result$p.value < 0.001, " ***", 
                            ifelse(cor_result$p.value < 0.01, " **",
                                  ifelse(cor_result$p.value < 0.05, " *", ""))))
    ) +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme(
      plot.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),
      plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 10, color = "gray50"),
      axis.title = element_text(size = 11),
      axis.text = element_text(size = 10)
    )
  
  return(list(plot = p, correlation = cor_result))
}

# 主函数：对指定的目标变量进行完整的相关性分析
analyze_correlations <- function(data, target_var, target_label = NULL, 
                                save_plots = TRUE, output_prefix = "plot") {
  
  # 如果没有提供标签，使用变量名
  if(is.null(target_label)) {
    target_label <- target_var
  }
  
  # 首先对目标变量进行3SD异常值去除
  cat("=== DATA CLEANING ===\n")
  clean_data <- remove_outliers_3sd(data, target_var)
  
  
  # 定义要分析的变量
  analysis_vars <- c("AQ", "social", "attention_switching", "local_attention", 
                     "communication", "imagination", "PI20", "Friendship")
  
  # 定义变量标签
  var_labels <- c("AQ Score", "Social Score", "Attention Switching", "Local Attention",
                  "Communication", "Imagination", "PI20 Score", "Friendship Score")
  
  # 进行所有相关性分析并生成图表
  correlations <- list()
  plots <- list()
  
  cat("\n=== CORRELATION ANALYSIS ===\n")
  
  for(i in 1:length(analysis_vars)) {
    var_name <- analysis_vars[i]
    var_label <- var_labels[i]
    
    # 检查变量是否存在于数据中
    if(var_name %in% names(clean_data)) {
      result <- create_correlation_plot(clean_data, var_name, target_var, 
                                       var_label, target_label)
      correlations[[var_name]] <- result
      plots[[var_name]] <- result$plot
    } else {
      cat("Warning: Variable", var_name, "not found in data\n")
    }
  }
  
  # 在RStudio中单独显示每个图表
  cat("\n=== DISPLAYING INDIVIDUAL PLOTS ===\n")
  
  for(i in 1:length(plots)) {
    var_name <- names(plots)[i]
    var_label <- var_labels[which(analysis_vars == var_name)]
    cat("Displaying Plot", i, ":", var_label, "vs", target_label, "\n")
    print(plots[[i]])
  }
  
  # 保存图表文件
  if(save_plots && length(plots) > 0) {
    cat("\n=== SAVING INDIVIDUAL PLOTS ===\n")
    
    for(i in 1:length(plots)) {
      var_name <- names(plots)[i]
      filename <- paste0(output_prefix, "_", var_name, "_vs_", target_var, ".png")
      ggsave(filename, plots[[i]], width = 8, height = 6, dpi = 300)
      cat("Saved:", filename, "\n")
    }
  }
  
  # 创建汇总表
  cat("\n=== CORRELATION SUMMARY ===\n")
  summary_table <- data.frame(
    Variable = names(correlations),
    Correlation = sapply(correlations, function(x) round(x$correlation$estimate, 4)),
    P_Value = sapply(correlations, function(x) x$correlation$p.value),
    Significance = sapply(correlations, function(x) {
      p <- x$correlation$p.value
      ifelse(p < 0.001, "***", ifelse(p < 0.01, "**", ifelse(p < 0.05, "*", "ns")))
    }),
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
  
  print(summary_table)
  
  return(list(
    clean_data = clean_data,
    correlations = correlations,
    plots = plots,
    summary = summary_table
  ))
}

# 使用示例：
# 对于look_0的分析
 result_look_0_analysis <- analyze_correlations(result_look, "look_0", "Look Behavior (0%)")

# 对于look_100的分析
result_look_100_analysis <- analyze_correlations(result_look, "look_100", "Look Behavior (100%)")
# 对于look_100m0的分析
result_look_100m0_analysis <- analyze_correlations(result_look, "look_100m0", "Look Behavior (100%-0%)")
```
```{r}
# 四组数据相关性分析执行代码

# 首先按order和gender分组（假设已经运行了分组代码）
group_uf_f <- subset(result_look, order == "uf" & gender == "f")
group_uf_m <- subset(result_look, order == "uf" & gender == "m")
group_fu_f <- subset(result_look, order == "fu" & gender == "f")
group_fu_m <- subset(result_look, order == "fu" & gender == "m")

# 对四组分别进行look_0的相关性分析
cat("=============================================\n")
cat("开始四组数据的look_0相关性分析\n")
cat("=============================================\n")

# 组1: UF + Female
cat("\n【组1: UF + Female】\n")
uf_f_look_0 <- analyze_correlations(group_uf_f, "look_0", "Look Behavior (0%) - UF Female", 
                                   save_plots = TRUE, output_prefix = "UF_Female_look_0")

# 组2: UF + Male
cat("\n【组2: UF + Male】\n")
uf_m_look_0 <- analyze_correlations(group_uf_m, "look_0", "Look Behavior (0%) - UF Male", 
                                   save_plots = TRUE, output_prefix = "UF_Male_look_0")

# 组3: FU + Female
cat("\n【组3: FU + Female】\n")
fu_f_look_0 <- analyze_correlations(group_fu_f, "look_0", "Look Behavior (0%) - FU Female", 
                                   save_plots = TRUE, output_prefix = "FU_Female_look_0")

# 组4: FU + Male
cat("\n【组4: FU + Male】\n")
fu_m_look_0 <- analyze_correlations(group_fu_m, "look_0", "Look Behavior (0%) - FU Male", 
                                   save_plots = TRUE, output_prefix = "FU_Male_look_0")

# 对四组分别进行look_100的相关性分析
cat("\n=============================================\n")
cat("开始四组数据的look_100相关性分析\n")
cat("=============================================\n")

# 组1: UF + Female
cat("\n【组1: UF + Female】\n")
uf_f_look_100 <- analyze_correlations(group_uf_f, "look_100", "Look Behavior (100%) - UF Female", 
                                     save_plots = TRUE, output_prefix = "UF_Female_look_100")

# 组2: UF + Male
cat("\n【组2: UF + Male】\n")
uf_m_look_100 <- analyze_correlations(group_uf_m, "look_100", "Look Behavior (100%) - UF Male", 
                                     save_plots = TRUE, output_prefix = "UF_Male_look_100")

# 组3: FU + Female
cat("\n【组3: FU + Female】\n")
fu_f_look_100 <- analyze_correlations(group_fu_f, "look_100", "Look Behavior (100%) - FU Female", 
                                     save_plots = TRUE, output_prefix = "FU_Female_look_100")

# 组4: FU + Male
cat("\n【组4: FU + Male】\n")
fu_m_look_100 <- analyze_correlations(group_fu_m, "look_100", "Look Behavior (100%) - FU Male", 
                                     save_plots = TRUE, output_prefix = "FU_Male_look_100")

# 对四组分别进行look_100m0的相关性分析
cat("\n=============================================\n")
cat("开始四组数据的look_100m0相关性分析\n")
cat("=============================================\n")

# 组1: UF + Female
cat("\n【组1: UF + Female】\n")
uf_f_look_100m0 <- analyze_correlations(group_uf_f, "look_100m0", "Look Behavior (100%-0%) - UF Female", 
                                       save_plots = TRUE, output_prefix = "UF_Female_look_100m0")

# 组2: UF + Male
cat("\n【组2: UF + Male】\n")
uf_m_look_100m0 <- analyze_correlations(group_uf_m, "look_100m0", "Look Behavior (100%-0%) - UF Male", 
                                       save_plots = TRUE, output_prefix = "UF_Male_look_100m0")

# 组3: FU + Female
cat("\n【组3: FU + Female】\n")
fu_f_look_100m0 <- analyze_correlations(group_fu_f, "look_100m0", "Look Behavior (100%-0%) - FU Female", 
                                       save_plots = TRUE, output_prefix = "FU_Female_look_100m0")

# 组4: FU + Male
cat("\n【组4: FU + Male】\n")
fu_m_look_100m0 <- analyze_correlations(group_fu_m, "look_100m0", "Look Behavior (100%-0%) - FU Male", 
                                       save_plots = TRUE, output_prefix = "FU_Male_look_100m0")

# 对四组分别进行look_5080的相关性分析
cat("\n=============================================\n")
cat("开始四组数据的look_5080相关性分析\n")
cat("=============================================\n")

# 组1: UF + Female
cat("\n【组1: UF + Female】\n")
uf_f_look_5080 <- analyze_correlations(group_uf_f, "look_5080", "Look Behavior (50-80%) - UF Female", 
                                      save_plots = TRUE, output_prefix = "UF_Female_look_5080")

# 组2: UF + Male
cat("\n【组2: UF + Male】\n")
uf_m_look_5080 <- analyze_correlations(group_uf_m, "look_5080", "Look Behavior (50-80%) - UF Male", 
                                      save_plots = TRUE, output_prefix = "UF_Male_look_5080")

# 组3: FU + Female
cat("\n【组3: FU + Female】\n")
fu_f_look_5080 <- analyze_correlations(group_fu_f, "look_5080", "Look Behavior (50-80%) - FU Female", 
                                      save_plots = TRUE, output_prefix = "FU_Female_look_5080")

# 组4: FU + Male
cat("\n【组4: FU + Male】\n")
fu_m_look_5080 <- analyze_correlations(group_fu_m, "look_5080", "Look Behavior (50-80%) - FU Male", 
                                      save_plots = TRUE, output_prefix = "FU_Male_look_5080")

cat("\n=============================================\n")
cat("所有四组数据的相关性分析已完成！\n")
cat("=============================================\n")
```
```{r}
Th <- result_Th %>%
  select(No, order, gender,condition,RT_mean)
anovakun(Th, "ABsC", long = TRUE,between = c("order", "gender"), within = "condition", dv = "RT_mean",eta=TRUE)
```

```{r}
# 加载必要的包
library(lme4)
library(lmerTest)  
library(emmeans)   
library(sjPlot)    
library(performance) 

# 准备数据
Th <- result_Th %>%
  select(No, order, gender, condition, RT_mean)

# 确保因子变量正确编码
Th$No <- as.factor(Th$No)
Th$order <- as.factor(Th$order)
Th$gender <- as.factor(Th$gender)
Th$condition <- as.factor(Th$condition)

# 建立线性混合模型
# No作为随机效应(被试内变量)
# order和gender作为被试间固定效应
# condition作为被试内固定效应
model0 <- lmer(RT_mean ~ order * gender * condition + (1|No), 
              data = Th,
              REML = TRUE)

model1 <- lmer(RT_mean ~ order + gender + condition + order:condition + (1|No), 
                    data = Th, REML = TRUE)

model2 <- lmer(RT_mean ~ order + condition + order:condition + (1|No), 
                    data = Th, REML = TRUE)
anova(model0,model1,model2)
summary(model2)
```
